articles.title: Nasdaq Files for Proposal To List and Trades Shares of Grayscale Hedera (HBAR) Trust
articles.description: Crypto asset manager Grayscale Investments is advancing plans to launch an exchange-traded fund (ETF) for Hedera Network’s native token HBAR, according to a new filing. The Nasdaq Stock Market submitted a 19b-4 filing to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to list and trade the Grayscale Hedera Trust. ETFs allow traders to expose themselves […] The post Nasdaq Files for Proposal To List and Trades Shares of Grayscale Hedera (HBAR) Trust appeared first on The Daily Hodl.

articles.title: US Government Will Only Buy Bitcoin, Not ETH, XRP, SOL and ADA
articles.description: The US federal government will only buy Bitcoin as part of its recently announced strategic crypto reserve, a source told Crypto Intelligence News on Tuesday. Over the weekend, Donald Trump announced via Truth Social that a number of cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin, Ether, Solana, Cardano and Ripple, would form the US federal government’s crypto reserve. articles.description: Solana's proposed protocol upgrades aim to enhance network sustainability by adjusting staking rewards and inflation.
